mncSheetNumbers.Description: Plugin for setting the sheet number in the document and in the volume in ModPlus format and title blocks
mncSheetNumbers.FullDescription: Plugin works in models and in sheets. First you need to get data that is read from the title blocks and formats of the ModPlus plugin. After specifying new data, you just need to apply the changes
mncSheetNumbers.h8: All "Number in document" values will be automatically numbered from this cell. An integer must be entered in the cell
mncSheetNumbers.h10: All "Number in volume" values will be automatically numbered from this cell. An integer must be entered in the cell
mncSheetNumbers.h14: You need to go to the "Model" tab
mncSheetNumbers.h24: You must enter an integer in the "Number in document"
mncSheetNumbers.h25: You must enter an integer in the "Number in volume"
mncSheetNumbers.d2: Left to right and top to bottom
mncSheetNumbers.d3: Left to right and bottom to top
mncSheetNumbers.d4: Right to left and top to bottom
mncSheetNumbers.d5: Right to left and bottom to top
